# Generated documentation artifacts

**Do not edit files in this folder by hand.**

| File | Command | Purpose |
|------|---------|---------|
| `api-manifest.json` | `npm run docs:manifest` | Route inventory from `src/` for doc sync and `npm run docs:check` |

Regenerate after any route change. Agents: see `../AGENTS.md` and `.agents/skills/docs-sync-workflow/SKILL.md`.
